description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that publishes Python distributions to PyPI and TestPyPI. The workflow triggers on push to the master branch and on tag pushes. It uses an ubuntu-latest job to check out the code, set up Python 3.9, bump the build ID for TestPyPI, install pypa/build, build a binary wheel and source tarball, and then publish to either TestPyPI or PyPI based on the ref.
